name: 5-Day Tour: Rabat → Chefchaouen → Fes → Meknes → Marrakech

seo.title: 5-Day Rabat to Marrakech Tour — Chefchaouen, Fes, Meknes, Volubilis | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: Private 5-day tour from Rabat to Marrakech: Chefchaouen (Blue City), medieval Fes with official guide, Meknes and Bab Mansour, Volubilis (UNESCO), Marrakech.

intro: This 5-day tour from Rabat covers the main stops of northern Morocco: blue Chefchaouen, medieval Fes with an official guide for the medina, Meknes and its monumental gates, ancient Volubilis. The tour ends in Marrakech, the ochre city.
